---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or architectural improvement.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when metrics don't support..."

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Outline the architectural approach (e.g. extending domain events, adding ports/adapters).

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, C4 diagrams, or mockups about the feature request here.
